summary: Completed comprehensive testing of García Sellerie Garniture website. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Page loads correctly with all sections
Logo displays in header and footer
Navigation works with smooth scrolling to sections
All service cards render (Automobile, Moto, Nautisme, Mobilier)
Gallery filter buttons work (Tous, Automobile, Moto, Nautisme, Mobilier)
Contact form submission integrates with backend successfully
All sections render correctly (hero, services, engagement, gallery, contact)
